title: Codex Everyday Guide
description: Practical bilingual Codex workflows with reviewable evidence and safety checks.

items.title: 首页 | Home
items.summary: 面向真实工作流的专业 Codex 双语文档。 Professional bilingual Codex documentation for real workflows.
items.content_text:
基础 / Basics
面向真实工作流的专业 Codex 双语文档。
Professional bilingual Codex documentation for real workflows.

items.title: 学习路线 | Learning Path
items.summary: 用三条路线覆盖普通用户、个人开发者和团队落地。读者不需要一次读完整站，应先选择与当前任务最接近的路径。 Use three routes for everyday users, individual developers, and team adoption. Readers should start with the route closest to the task at hand instead of reading the whole site first.
items.content_text:
教程 / Guide
用三条路线覆盖普通用户、个人开发者和团队落地。读者不需要一次读完整站，应先选择与当前任务最接近的路径。
Use three routes for everyday users, individual developers, and team adoption. Readers should start with the route closest to the task at hand instead of reading the whole site first.

items.title: 入口地图 | Entry Point Map
items.summary: 同一套 Codex 能力在不同入口里的节奏不同。专业使用方式是先选入口，再设计任务。 The same Codex capability behaves differently across entry points. A professional workflow chooses the entry point before designing the task.
items.content_text:
入口 / Platform
同一套 Codex 能力在不同入口里的节奏不同。专业使用方式是先选入口，再设计任务。
The same Codex capability behaves differently across entry points. A professional workflow chooses the entry point before designing the task.

items.title: 配置总览 | Configuration overview
items.summary: 用最小配置建立可理解、可回退、可审计的 Codex 工作环境。 Establish a Codex environment that is understandable, reversible, and auditable with minimal configuration.
items.content_text:
配置 / Configuration
用最小配置建立可理解、可回退、可审计的 Codex 工作环境。
Establish a Codex environment that is understandable, reversible, and auditable with minimal configuration.

items.title: CLI 选项与命令 | CLI options and commands
items.summary: 把 CLI 选项整理成任务执行、模型选择、审批控制和排障四类。 Organize CLI options into task execution, model selection, approval control, and troubleshooting.
items.content_text:
配置 / Configuration
把 CLI 选项整理成任务执行、模型选择、审批控制和排障四类。
Organize CLI options into task execution, model selection, approval control, and troubleshooting.

items.title: config.toml 任务配置 | config.toml task configuration
items.summary: 用配置文件沉淀稳定偏好，同时避免把凭据和私人信息写进仓库。 Use configuration files to persist stable preferences while keeping credentials and private data out of the repository.
items.content_text:
配置 / Configuration
用配置文件沉淀稳定偏好，同时避免把凭据和私人信息写进仓库。
Use configuration files to persist stable preferences while keeping credentials and private data out of the repository.

items.title: MCP、Skills 与 Subagents | MCP, Skills, and Subagents
items.summary: 区分工具连接、方法沉淀和任务拆分，避免把扩展能力一次性全部打开。 Separate tool connections, reusable methods, and task decomposition instead of enabling every extension at once.
items.content_text:
配置 / Configuration
区分工具连接、方法沉淀和任务拆分，避免把扩展能力一次性全部打开。
Separate tool connections, reusable methods, and task decomposition instead of enabling every extension at once.

items.title: 安全与审批 | Security and approvals
items.summary: 将文件、命令、网络、凭据和团队规则纳入统一审批模型。 Bring files, commands, network access, credentials, and team policy into one approval model.
items.content_text:
配置 / Configuration
将文件、命令、网络、凭据和团队规则纳入统一审批模型。
Bring files, commands, network access, credentials, and team policy into one approval model.

items.title: 实践方法 | Operating Model
items.summary: 把每次任务拆成说明、探索、实施、验证和复盘五段，形成可复用工作法。 Split every task into brief, discovery, execution, verification, and retrospective to create a reusable operating model.
items.content_text:
资源 / Resources
把每次任务拆成说明、探索、实施、验证和复盘五段，形成可复用工作法。
Split every task into brief, discovery, execution, verification, and retrospective to create a reusable operating model.

items.title: 官方文档 | Official Documentation
items.summary: 最后核对：2026-05-28。功能、价格、限额、模型和安全策略必须回到 OpenAI 官方文档核对。 Last checked: 2026-05-28. Product behavior, pricing, limits, models, and safety policy must be validated against official OpenAI documentation.
items.content_text:
资源 / Resources
最后核对：2026-05-28。功能、价格、限额、模型和安全策略必须回到 OpenAI 官方文档核对。
Last checked: 2026-05-28. Product behavior, pricing, limits, models, and safety policy must be validated against official OpenAI documentation.

items.title: 共建路线图 | Contribution Roadmap
items.summary: 用 Issue、PR、验收清单和事实核对流程维护一个可持续开源文档项目。 Maintain a sustainable open-source documentation project with issues, pull requests, acceptance checklists, and fact checks.
items.content_text:
资源 / Resources
用 Issue、PR、验收清单和事实核对流程维护一个可持续开源文档项目。
Maintain a sustainable open-source documentation project with issues, pull requests, acceptance checklists, and fact checks.

items.title: 01 安装并打开桌面端 | 01 Install and open the desktop app
items.summary: 完成安装、登录和第一个低风险工作区确认。 Complete installation, sign-in, and first low-risk workspace validation.
items.content_text:
教程 / Guide
完成安装、登录和第一个低风险工作区确认。
Complete installation, sign-in, and first low-risk workspace validation.

items.title: 02 准备账号、计划与使用边界 | 02 Prepare account, plan, and usage boundaries
items.summary: 确认当前计划、数据控制、适用任务与不适用任务。 Confirm current plan, data controls, supported tasks, and unsupported tasks.
items.content_text:
教程 / Guide
确认当前计划、数据控制、适用任务与不适用任务。
Confirm current plan, data controls, supported tasks, and unsupported tasks.

items.title: 03 认识桌面 App 的任务界面 | 03 Understand the desktop task interface
items.summary: 理解任务区、文件区、权限提示、差异预览和结果回看。 Understand the task pane, file area, permission prompts, diff preview, and result review.
items.content_text:
教程 / Guide
理解任务区、文件区、权限提示、差异预览和结果回看。
Understand the task pane, file area, permission prompts, diff preview, and result review.

items.title: 04 手机发起、桌面接手 | 04 Start on mobile and hand off to desktop
items.summary: 把移动端灵感或临时任务转成桌面可执行的工作单。 Convert a mobile note or ad-hoc idea into an executable desktop work order.
items.content_text:
教程 / Guide
把移动端灵感或临时任务转成桌面可执行的工作单。
Convert a mobile note or ad-hoc idea into an executable desktop work order.

items.title: 05 完成第一个低风险任务 | 05 Complete the first low-risk task
items.summary: 用一份资料副本跑通说明、执行、验证和复盘。 Use a duplicate source file to complete scope definition, execution, verification, and retrospective.
items.content_text:
教程 / Guide
用一份资料副本跑通说明、执行、验证和复盘。
Use a duplicate source file to complete scope definition, execution, verification, and retrospective.

items.title: 06 排队、并行与任务节奏 | 06 Queueing, parallel work, and task pacing
items.summary: 区分顺序任务、并行任务和需要用户确认的暂停点。 Distinguish sequential tasks, parallel tasks, and user-confirmation pause points.
items.content_text:
教程 / Guide
区分顺序任务、并行任务和需要用户确认的暂停点。
Distinguish sequential tasks, parallel tasks, and user-confirmation pause points.

items.title: 07 权限弹窗怎么判断 | 07 Review permission prompts
items.summary: 用文件、命令、网络和账号四类问题判断是否授权。 Decide whether to approve by evaluating file, command, network, and account actions.
items.content_text:
教程 / Guide
用文件、命令、网络和账号四类问题判断是否授权。
Decide whether to approve by evaluating file, command, network, and account actions.

items.title: 08 用 Skills 与插件扩展任务 | 08 Extend tasks with Skills and plugins
items.summary: 理解 Skills、MCP 和插件如何扩展 Codex 工作流。 Understand how Skills, MCP, and plugins extend Codex workflows.
items.content_text:
教程 / Guide
理解 Skills、MCP 和插件如何扩展 Codex 工作流。
Understand how Skills, MCP, and plugins extend Codex workflows.

items.title: 09 自动化前的确认清单 | 09 Pre-automation checklist
items.summary: 把重复任务自动化前，先定义触发条件、退出条件和失败提醒。 Before automating repeated work, define triggers, exit conditions, and failure notifications.
items.content_text:
教程 / Guide
把重复任务自动化前，先定义触发条件、退出条件和失败提醒。
Before automating repeated work, define triggers, exit conditions, and failure notifications.

items.title: 10 搭建个人任务工作台 | 10 Build a personal task workbench
items.summary: 用固定目录、模板和检查清单沉淀个人常用任务。 Use stable folders, templates, and checklists to standardize personal tasks.
items.content_text:
教程 / Guide
用固定目录、模板和检查清单沉淀个人常用任务。
Use stable folders, templates, and checklists to standardize personal tasks.

items.title: 11 CLI 安装与登录 | 11 Install and sign in to the CLI
items.summary: 从终端启动 Codex，确认本地仓库和命令执行边界。 Start Codex from the terminal and confirm local repository and command execution boundaries.
items.content_text:
教程 / Guide
从终端启动 Codex，确认本地仓库和命令执行边界。
Start Codex from the terminal and confirm local repository and command execution boundaries.

items.title: 12 第一次让 Codex 改一个小项目 | 12 First small project edit with the CLI
items.summary: 让 Codex 先计划，再小步修改，最后用测试或页面检查验收。 Ask Codex to plan first, make a small edit, and verify with tests or page review.
items.content_text:
教程 / Guide
让 Codex 先计划，再小步修改，最后用测试或页面检查验收。
Ask Codex to plan first, make a small edit, and verify with tests or page review.

items.title: 13 在 VS Code 中协同修改 | 13 Collaborate in VS Code
items.summary: 在编辑器上下文中解释局部代码、提出补丁和整理提交说明。 Use editor context to explain local code, propose patches, and prepare commit notes.
items.content_text:
教程 / Guide
在编辑器上下文中解释局部代码、提出补丁和整理提交说明。
Use editor context to explain local code, propose patches, and prepare commit notes.

items.title: 14 用 AGENTS.md 写项目规则 | 14 Define project rules with AGENTS.md
items.summary: 把项目命令、风格、禁区和验收方式写进仓库规则。 Document project commands, style, restricted areas, and acceptance checks in the repository.
items.content_text:
教程 / Guide
把项目命令、风格、禁区和验收方式写进仓库规则。
Document project commands, style, restricted areas, and acceptance checks in the repository.

items.title: 15 沙盒、审批与回退 | 15 Sandbox, approvals, and rollback
items.summary: 建立文件、网络、凭据和高风险命令的审批边界。 Set approval boundaries for files, network, credentials, and high-risk commands.
items.content_text:
教程 / Guide
建立文件、网络、凭据和高风险命令的审批边界。
Set approval boundaries for files, network, credentials, and high-risk commands.

items.title: 16 云端任务与本地接力 | 16 Cloud tasks and local handoff
items.summary: 把长任务交给云端执行，再在本地检查差异和结果。 Delegate long-running tasks to cloud execution and review diffs locally.
items.content_text:
教程 / Guide
把长任务交给云端执行，再在本地检查差异和结果。
Delegate long-running tasks to cloud execution and review diffs locally.

items.title: 17 排障手册 | 17 Troubleshooting handbook
items.summary: 按登录、权限、依赖、网络、执行和输出质量定位问题。 Diagnose issues across sign-in, permissions, dependencies, network, execution, and output quality.
items.content_text:
教程 / Guide
按登录、权限、依赖、网络、执行和输出质量定位问题。
Diagnose issues across sign-in, permissions, dependencies, network, execution, and output quality.

items.title: 案例总览 | Recipe Index
items.summary: 14 个案例按真实任务复盘组织，重点展示输入、证据、结果、失败修正和验收方式。 Fourteen recipes are organized as real task retrospectives, highlighting input, evidence, result, correction, and acceptance method.
items.content_text:
实战案例 / Recipes
14 个案例按真实任务复盘组织，重点展示输入、证据、结果、失败修正和验收方式。
Fourteen recipes are organized as real task retrospectives, highlighting input, evidence, result, correction, and acceptance method.

items.title: 01 演示稿生成与导出核查 | 01 Deck Generation and Export Verification
items.summary: 用一份脱敏产品说明生成 7 页演示稿，并用导出截图、逐页表和人工确认项判断是否可交付。 Generate a seven-slide deck from a redacted product brief and judge delivery with export screenshots, a slide table, and human confirmations.
items.content_text:
实战案例 / Recipes
用一份脱敏产品说明生成 7 页演示稿，并用导出截图、逐页表和人工确认项判断是否可交付。
Generate a seven-slide deck from a redacted product brief and judge delivery with export screenshots, a slide table, and human confirmations.

items.title: 02 浏览器页面巡检与截图证据 | 02 Browser Page Review with Screenshot Evidence
items.summary: 用本地页面做一次只读巡检，记录桌面与手机视口、控制台状态、截图证据和问题优先级。 Run a read-only review of a local page, recording desktop and mobile viewports, console state, screenshot evidence, and issue priority.
items.content_text:
实战案例 / Recipes
用本地页面做一次只读巡检，记录桌面与手机视口、控制台状态、截图证据和问题优先级。
Run a read-only review of a local page, recording desktop and mobile viewports, console state, screenshot evidence, and issue priority.

items.title: 03 GitHub Pages 部署失败诊断 | 03 GitHub Pages Deployment Failure Diagnosis
items.summary: 从失败通知、Actions job 和本地检查命令定位 Pages 发布问题，并用新的 run 与线上响应完成闭环。 Diagnose a Pages deployment issue from failure notification, Actions jobs, and local checks, then close the loop with a new run and live response.
items.content_text:
实战案例 / Recipes
从失败通知、Actions job 和本地检查命令定位 Pages 发布问题，并用新的 run 与线上响应完成闭环。
Diagnose a Pages deployment issue from failure notification, Actions jobs, and local checks, then close the loop with a new run and live response.

items.title: 04 本地文档站批量改版 | 04 Local Documentation Site Redesign
items.summary: 把静态文档站一次性改成深色产品工作台，并用页面数量、链接、截图和禁用词检查证明未破坏发布链路。 Redesign a static documentation site into a dark product workspace and prove the publish chain remains intact with page count, links, screenshots, and blocked-word checks.
items.content_text:
实战案例 / Recipes
把静态文档站一次性改成深色产品工作台，并用页面数量、链接、截图和禁用词检查证明未破坏发布链路。
Redesign a static documentation site into a dark product workspace and prove the publish chain remains intact with page count, links, screenshots, and blocked-word checks.

items.title: 05 Markdown 知识库重整 | 05 Markdown Knowledge Base Restructure
items.summary: 把散乱 Markdown 笔记整理成统一 frontmatter、主题索引和待补清单，并保留样本 diff 便于回退。 Restructure scattered Markdown notes into consistent frontmatter, a topic index, and a pending list while keeping sample diffs for rollback.
items.content_text:
实战案例 / Recipes
把散乱 Markdown 笔记整理成统一 frontmatter、主题索引和待补清单，并保留样本 diff 便于回退。
Restructure scattered Markdown notes into consistent frontmatter, a topic index, and a pending list while keeping sample diffs for rollback.

items.title: 06 表格数据清洗与异常核对 | 06 Spreadsheet Cleanup and Anomaly Review
items.summary: 对一份脱敏 CSV 做只读画像、异常分类、清理建议和人工复核表，保留原始行号便于追溯。 Profile a redacted CSV read-only, classify anomalies, produce cleanup suggestions and a human review sheet, and keep original row numbers for traceability.
items.content_text:
实战案例 / Recipes
对一份脱敏 CSV 做只读画像、异常分类、清理建议和人工复核表，保留原始行号便于追溯。
Profile a redacted CSV read-only, classify anomalies, produce cleanup suggestions and a human review sheet, and keep original row numbers for traceability.

items.title: 07 设计截图转实现规格 | 07 Design Screenshot to Implementation Spec
items.summary: 把目标截图和当前页面截图转成可执行改版规格，输出组件映射、状态表、风险项和截图验收方式。 Turn target and current screenshots into an actionable redesign spec with component mapping, state table, risks, and screenshot acceptance.
items.content_text:
实战案例 / Recipes
把目标截图和当前页面截图转成可执行改版规格，输出组件映射、状态表、风险项和截图验收方式。
Turn target and current screenshots into an actionable redesign spec with component mapping, state table, risks, and screenshot acceptance.

items.title: 08 登录态网页只读检查 | 08 Read-only Review of an Authenticated Web Page
items.summary: 在用户已登录的浏览器里只读检查页面状态，记录可见问题、禁点清单和待用户确认动作。 Read page state in the user's signed-in browser, recording visible issues, no-click controls, and actions needing user confirmation.
items.content_text:
实战案例 / Recipes
在用户已登录的浏览器里只读检查页面状态，记录可见问题、禁点清单和待用户确认动作。
Read page state in the user's signed-in browser, recording visible issues, no-click controls, and actions needing user confirmation.

items.title: 09 文档与 PDF 摘要到证据表 | 09 Document and PDF Summary to Evidence Table
items.summary: 把长文档拆成带页码的证据表，保留摘录线索、置信度和待确认项，避免只有自然段摘要。 Turn a long document into a page-numbered evidence table with excerpt cues, confidence, and confirmation items instead of only paragraph summaries.
items.content_text:
实战案例 / Recipes
把长文档拆成带页码的证据表，保留摘录线索、置信度和待确认项，避免只有自然段摘要。
Turn a long document into a page-numbered evidence table with excerpt cues, confidence, and confirmation items instead of only paragraph summaries.

items.title: 10 API 变更影响分析 | 10 API Change Impact Analysis
items.summary: 把一份接口变更说明转成端点影响表、调用点清单、测试矩阵和发布风险，不直接修改代码。 Turn API change notes into endpoint impact, call-site inventory, test matrix, and release risk without editing code directly.
items.content_text:
实战案例 / Recipes
把一份接口变更说明转成端点影响表、调用点清单、测试矩阵和发布风险，不直接修改代码。
Turn API change notes into endpoint impact, call-site inventory, test matrix, and release risk without editing code directly.

items.title: 11 发布说明与变更日志生成 | 11 Release Notes and Changelog Drafting
items.summary: 从提交范围生成公开发布说明、内部变更日志和待确认项，把技术提交翻译成可发布内容。 Generate public release notes, internal changelog, and confirmation items from a commit range, translating technical commits into publishable content.
items.content_text:
实战案例 / Recipes
从提交范围生成公开发布说明、内部变更日志和待确认项，把技术提交翻译成可发布内容。
Generate public release notes, internal changelog, and confirmation items from a commit range, translating technical commits into publishable content.

items.title: 12 自动化提醒与定期检查 | 12 Automation Reminders and Scheduled Checks
items.summary: 把重复检查任务设计成只提醒、不越权的自动化流程，先手动试跑，再确认频率、暂停规则和输出格式。 Design a recurring check as a reminder-only automation that does not overstep, with a manual trial before confirming frequency, pause rules, and output format.
items.content_text:
实战案例 / Recipes
把重复检查任务设计成只提醒、不越权的自动化流程，先手动试跑，再确认频率、暂停规则和输出格式。
Design a recurring check as a reminder-only automation that does not overstep, with a manual trial before confirming frequency, pause rules, and output format.

items.title: 13 日志报错定位与修复建议 | 13 Log Error Diagnosis and Fix Proposal
items.summary: 把构建或服务日志整理成根因假设、验证命令、最小修复、回退方式和复跑验收。 Turn build or service logs into root-cause hypotheses, validation commands, minimal fix, rollback method, and rerun acceptance.
items.content_text:
实战案例 / Recipes
把构建或服务日志整理成根因假设、验证命令、最小修复、回退方式和复跑验收。
Turn build or service logs into root-cause hypotheses, validation commands, minimal fix, rollback method, and rerun acceptance.

items.title: 14 远程服务健康检查与修复建议 | 14 Remote Service Health Check and Fix Proposal
items.summary: 用脱敏健康日志和只读命令记录复盘一次服务异常，输出根因排序、修复建议、回退方式和复测清单。 Use redacted health logs and read-only command records to review a service incident, then output root-cause ranking, fix proposal, rollback path, and retest checklist.
items.content_text:
实战案例 / Recipes
用脱敏健康日志和只读命令记录复盘一次服务异常，输出根因排序、修复建议、回退方式和复测清单。
Use redacted health logs and read-only command records to review a service incident, then output root-cause ranking, fix proposal, rollback path, and retest checklist.

items.title: 使用规范 | Usage Policy
items.summary: 说明隐私、安全、人工复核和发布前确认要求。 Document privacy, safety, human review, and pre-publication confirmation requirements.
items.content_text:
实战案例 / Recipes
说明隐私、安全、人工复核和发布前确认要求。
Document privacy, safety, human review, and pre-publication confirmation requirements.
